scripts.build: NODE_ENV=production next build && pnpm run standalone:assets
scripts.standalone:assets: mkdir -p .next/standalone/apps/web/.next && rm -rf .next/standalone/apps/web/.next/static && cp -R .next/static .next/standalone/apps/web/.next/static && if [ -d public ]; then rm -rf .next/standalone/apps/web/public && cp -R public .next/standalone/apps/web/public; fi
